/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/video_server_nicegui_smoke_server.dir/examples/nicegui_smoke/synthetic_webrtc_smoke_server.cpp.o -o video_server_nicegui_smoke_server   -L/workspace/video-server/build-fresh/vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib  -L/workspace/video-server/build-fresh/vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/video-server/build-fresh/vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib:/workspace/video-server/build-fresh/vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib libvideo_server_webrtc.a libvideo_server_core.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libavdevice.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libavfilter.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libavformat.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libavcodec.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libswresample.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libswscale.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libavutil.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libopenh264.a -lstdc++ -lm -latomic -pthread vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libspdlogd.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libfmtd.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libtomlplusplus.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libdatachannel.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libusrsctp.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libjuice.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libsrtp2.a
